name: mismatched year params with rate type and year splits
description: Verifies that rate type CTE WHERE clause includes the full query-level year range when year splits are active, even when the rate type column has a narrower year range than another column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t0957f9aee7b52cb82affca7cd0206349" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams,
